art_direction.line_style: Clean, rounded, cartoon lines com espessura variável
art_direction.shading: Flat shading com sombras suaves (cel-shading leve)
art_direction.expressions: Exageradas e expressivas — estilo cartoon ocidental
art_direction.environments: Ricos em detalhes, cores vibrantes, atmosfera acolhedora

prompt_templates.character_sheet: Character design sheet, {character_description}, cartoon style, clean lines, vibrant colors, front view and 3/4 view, white background, professional character design, Cartoon Network style, Brazilian animation, cute and expressive
prompt_templates.scene_background: Cartoon background, {scene_description}, vibrant colors, clean art style, detailed environment, no characters, 16:9 aspect ratio, animation background art, Studio Ghibli meets Cartoon Network
prompt_templates.animation_frame: Animated cartoon frame, {action_description}, {character_name} in the scene, cartoon style, expressive pose, vibrant colors, Brazilian cartoon aesthetic, high quality animation cel
prompt_templates.thumbnail: YouTube thumbnail, {scene_description}, cartoon style, vibrant saturated colors, dramatic lighting, expressive character, bold composition, eye-catching, 1280x720

negative_prompts.character: realistic, photographic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, nsfw, violence, gore
negative_prompts.background: characters, people, realistic, photographic, blurry, low quality, watermark, text
negative_prompts.animation: static, still image, realistic, uncanny valley, jerky motion, low framerate
